failure.symptom: Next.js编译500错误：markmap-view引用markmap-common中不存在的childSelector导出。安装markmap-common后仍报Attempted import error: childSelector is not exported from markmap-common。
attempted: npm install后直接npm run dev（Module not found: Can't resolve markmap-common）
npm install markmap-common --legacy-peer-deps后重试（Attempted import error: childSelector is not exported）
failure.recommendation: markmap相关包版本不兼容，需锁定正确版本或跳过
